steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to define what “georeferencing” means — to explain what the term refers to and what it accomplishes.

steps.title: Match the definition to the choices
steps.content:
D provides exactly that: Georeferencing is the process of assigning geographic coordinates to an image so that mapping software can place it in its real-world location.

This explains both what the process is (assigning coordinates) and why it matters (enabling placement in real-world location).

The other three all mention georeferencing but never explain what it actually is.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
